item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, hak individu juga tidak boleh direduksi hanya karena kebutuhan kolektif.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that social interests should take priority, but increasingly qualifies that position with rights-protection and abuse-of-power concerns. Agent B stays mostly rights-first throughout, while acknowledging social justice and balance. No complete reversal is visible.
